Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: 0, None, None; 1, GUID_Asc, GUID_ Asc; 2, GUID_Desc, GUID_ Desc; 3, UserName_Asc, User Name_ Asc; 4, UserName_Desc, User Name_ Desc; 5, UserEmail_Asc, User Email_ Asc; 6, UserEmail_Desc, User Email_ Desc; 7, UserFirstName_Asc, User First Name_ Asc; 8, UserFirstName_Desc, User First Name_ Desc; 9, UserLastName_Asc, User Last Name_ Asc; 10, UserLastName_Desc, User Last Name_ Desc; 11, UserExternalId_Asc, User External Id_Asc; 12, UserExternalId_Desc, User External Id_Desc
